commands.review_summary:
The PR changes OpenRouter-routed DeepSeek V4 handling to keep nested `reasoning.effort`, remove DeepSeek-native `thinking`/`reasoning_effort` fields for that route, adjust core non-native DeepSeek V4 fallback detection, update tests, and correct the OpenRouter provider doc.

PR surface: Source +33, Tests +58, Docs 0. Total +91 across 5 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main can build nested OpenRouter `reasoning.effort` and then apply a DeepSeek V4 wrapper that adds top-level `reasoning_effort`. I did not run a live OpenRouter request in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The remaining blocker is contributor-provided real OpenRouter proof plus one docs update; ClawSweeper should not open a repair lane because automation cannot prove the contributor's live provider setup.

target.title: fix: avoid DeepSeek-native thinking on OpenRouter V4
target.body:
Fixes #97196

## What Problem This Solves

Fixes an issue where users running OpenRouter-routed DeepSeek V4 models could hit a 400 response because OpenClaw sent both OpenRouter reasoning controls and DeepSeek-native thinking controls in the same request.

## Why This Change Was Made

OpenRouter DeepSeek V4 requests now stay on the OpenRouter reasoning payload shape (`reasoning.effort`) instead of adding DeepSeek-native `thinking` / `reasoning_effort` fields after the provider wrapper runs. The DeepSeek V4 replay repair still backfills `reasoning_content` only when OpenRouter reasoning remains enabled, and the core fallback now respects detected non-native thinking formats so unowned DeepSeek-compatible proxy routes keep their native fallback without breaking OpenRouter.

## User Impact

Users can use `openrouter/deepseek/deepseek-v4-flash` and `openrouter/deepseek/deepseek-v4-pro` without the request being rejected for conflicting reasoning fields. `/think max` and stale max overrides still map to OpenRouter's supported `xhigh` effort.

## Evidence

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/openrouter/index.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/extra-params.deepseek-v4-thinking-format.test.ts`
  - `extensions/openrouter/index.test.ts`: 43 passed
  - `src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/extra-params.deepseek-v4-thinking-format.test.ts`: 9 passed
- `git diff --check`
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local`
  - clean: no accepted/actionable findings reported

Real behavior proof still to add before ready-for-review:

- Screenshot of a live OpenRouter DeepSeek V4 request succeeding from OpenClaw.
- Screenshot or redacted log line showing the outbound request/request debug no longer contains top-level `reasoning_effort` or `thinking`, while `reasoning.effort` is present.
